commands.review_summary:
The PR extends Feishu media upload duration probing from audio-only sends to audio and video/media sends, and adds mp4 tests for local and remote video uploads.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests +17. Total +45 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main routes mp4/video uploads as Feishu media but only probes upload duration for audio routes, so video uploads omit the duration field.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and merge gating for the draft PR after proof labels/checks catch up to the supplied evidence.

target.title: [codex] fix(feishu): include video upload duration
target.body:
## Summary

- Probe outbound Feishu upload duration for both audio and video/media messages.
- Preserve best-effort behavior: if ffprobe fails, omit `duration` and still send the message.
- Add local and remote mp4 coverage asserting Feishu file upload receives duration while keeping `msg_type=media`.

## Why

Feishu voice/audio bubbles already get upload `duration` from ffprobe. Video uploads use `file_type=mp4` and `msg_type=media`, but the duration probe was gated on `msgType === "audio"`, so videos were uploaded without duration and displayed without a visible length.

## Validation

- `CI=1 pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `CI=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-feishu.config.ts extensions/feishu/src/media.test.ts` (44 passed)
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/feishu/src/media.ts extensions/feishu/src/media.test.ts`
- Live Feishu proof on commit `550c361fbec2b63746321a57828e839e2f9024c5`: sent `openclaw-pr-98235-duration-test-5s.mp4` through the PR branch `sendMediaFeishu` path; local `ffprobe` reported `5.000000` seconds and Feishu rendered the received video bubble with `00:05` duration. Thumbnail/preview-frame generation is unchanged and outside this PR.

![Feishu video bubble showing 00:05 duration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/areslp/openclaw/codex/pr-98235-feishu-proof/pr-evidence/feishu-video-duration-00-05.jpg)
target.author: areslp
